text: Amazon Macie - Identifiers @ et © s e Managed data identifiers - maintained by AWS e .. growing list of common sensitive data types ¢ .. Credentials, finance, Health, personal identifiers e Custom data identifiers - created by you * Regex - defines a ‘pattern’ to match in data e.g. [A-Z]-\d{8} * Keywords - optional sequences that need to be in proximity to regex match e Maximum Match Distance - how close keywords are to regex pattern e |gnore Words - if regex match contains ignore words, it's ignored
